title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates:
Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates!
